heading: Limitation on revoking or amending certain pre-1969 certificates of public convenience and necessity
label: 3394 Limitation on revoking or amending certain pre-1969 certificates of public convenience and necessity
notes: References in TextThe Natural Gas Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , which is classified generally to chapter 15B (§ 717 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 21, 1938, ch. 55652 Stat. 821section 717w of this title
amendments: References in TextThe Natural Gas Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , which is classified generally to chapter 15B (§ 717 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 21, 1938, ch. 55652 Stat. 821section 717w of this title

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The Commission may not, during the 10-year period beginning on , revoke or amend any certificate of public convenience and necessity issued before , under section 7 of the Natural Gas Act [] for the transportation of natural gas owned by any electric utility except upon the application of the person to whom such certificate was issued.November 9, 1978January 1, 196915 U.S.C. 717f

children.heading: Commission curtailment authority
children.label: b Commission curtailment authority
children.text: The limitation under subsection (a) shall not affect the authority of the Commission to enforce any curtailment of deliveries of natural gas under the Natural Gas Act [ et seq.].15 U.S.C. 717
